items.summary: Add CSS `@media print` rules to the global stylesheet (frontend/src/index.css) that hide the navigation header (the sticky nav bar containing the MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH text, navigation links, and logout button) and all other screen-only UI elements (page action buttons, sidebars, breadcrumbs, filter controls) during printing. Only the invoice content rendered by InvoicePrintView must appear on the printed page: the company header with MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH name, party name, party GST number, invoice number, bill date, line items table, and GST summary section. No website chrome must appear on any printed page.

Audit and fix the backend canister actor initialization in `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` to ensure the ICP backend canister actor is created using the anonymous identity, instantiated once, cached, and reused across all sessions. Verify that the Candid/IDL interface declared in the frontend actor factory exactly matches all current backend method signatures in `backend/main.mo` (addBill, editBill, deleteBill, getAllBills, searchBills, getPartySummaryByDateRange, getCompanyReport, getProfitLossSummary, savePartyGstNumber, getPartyGstNumber, getUniquePartyNames, getUniqueProductNames). Fix any method signature mismatch, stale import, or race condition that causes the actor to be undefined or fail to connect, so that bills created on one device are visible on all other devices via the shared stable canister storage.

Confirm that the backend `backend/main.mo` actor uses stable variables for the bills map and partyProfiles map, and that `preupgrade` and `postupgrade` system hooks correctly serialize and deserialize all stable state. Bills must be globally accessible from any device via the shared canister stable storage and must survive every canister upgrade and redeployment without data loss.
